subject: [PATCH] fs/fcntl: fix SOFTIRQ-unsafe lock order in send_sigio()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Approved the initial patch and suggested that the author also fix send_sigurg().

reviews.author: Mingyu Wang
reviews.summary: Posted a new version of the patch (v2) that fixes an identical deadlock vector in send_sigurg() and adds a Reviewed-by tag from Jeff Layton.

2026-05-23.patch_summary: Fixes a SOFTIRQ-unsafe lock order deadlock in send_sigio() and send_sigurg() by replacing tasklist_lock with rcu_read_lock().
